mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repair (user_id, dorm_id, repair_type, description, status, result, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{dormId}, #{repairType}, #{description}, #{status}, #{result}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE repair SET status = #{status}, result = #{result}, worker_name = #{workerName}, worker_phone = #{workerPhone}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.user_id, r.dorm_id, r.repair_type, r.description, r.status, r.result, r.worker_name, r.worker_phone, r.created_at, u.name as student_name, u.student_id, CONCAT(d.building, ' - ', d.room_number) as dorm FROM repair r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN assignment a ON r.user_id = a.user_id AND a.status = 'active' LEFT JOIN dorm d ON a.dorm_id = d.id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair WHERE status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'assigned')
